title: Junior German Speaking IT Support Specialist

summary.lv: Atea Global Services meklē Junior IT atbalsta speciālistu ar vācu valodas prasmēm, kas pievienosies Servicedesk komandai un sniegs IT atbalstu Vācijas klientiem.
summary.en: Atea Global Services is hiring a Junior German-speaking IT Support Specialist to join the Servicedesk team and provide IT support to German customers.
